## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe what doesn't work for you. -->
<!-- Example: I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear description of what you want to happen. How should this feature work? -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Impact & Value

<!-- Who would benefit from this? How much time/effort would it save? -->
<!-- Examples: "This would help power users organize large collections faster" -->

- [ ] This would benefit many users
- [ ] This is specific to my use case
- [ ] I'm willing to contribute this feature

## Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or links to similar features in other apps -->

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Optional: any technical thoughts on how this could be implemented -->
<!-- Example: "This could use the existing BullMQ queue to batch-process items" -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request -->
